channel.title: Frontity Framework Description
channel.description: I always wonder what description should I use: - Frontity is a framework to build WordPress themes with React. - Frontity is a framework to build React themes for WordPress.

item.title: Frontity Framework Description
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
I usually read “WordPress themes with React” in articles, questions in Quora, Reddit, even on GitHub repos (https://github.com/jackreichert/a-wp-react-redux-theme). Maybe it’s more commonly used.

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Framework Description
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
I always wonder what description should I use:

  • Frontity is a framework to build WordPress themes with React.
  • Frontity is a framework to build React themes for WordPress.

Read full topic
